<details>
<summary>text transcript</summary>

AxCalendar
The most customizable FREE advent calendar plugin!

What is AxCalendar?
AxCalendar brings advent calendars to minecraft! Reward your players every day during december.

Features

* Database support: H2, SQLite, MySQL, PostgreSQL
* Configurable: It is possible to change any part of the gui and you can add decorations
* Works everywhere: You can change the used timezone without a restart
* IP limit: Prevent alt account abuse
* Customizable: You can add as many rewards as you want, and you can set up everything in the way you prefer
* Lightweight

Commands:
/axcalendar reload | Reload config & messages

Permissions:
axcalendar.reload
</details>
